meaning: 1. to cut into; 2. to incise; 3. to penetrate deeply into (a topic, ar
sentence: 他从用户体验的角度切入这个问题。
pinyin: Tā cóng yònghù tǐyàn de jiǎodù qiērù zhège wèntí.
english: He approached the problem from the angle of user experience.

sentence: 仓库里的存货快卖完了。
pinyin: Cāngkù lǐ de cúnhuò kuài mài wán le.
english: The inventory in the warehouse is almost sold out.

sentence: 这些水果的总称是热带水果。
pinyin: Zhèxiē shuǐguǒ de zǒngchēng shì rèdài shuǐguǒ.
english: The generic term for these fruits is tropical fruit.

sentence: 军队每年都会进行一次征兵工作。
pinyin: Jūnduì měi nián dōu huì jìnxíng yī cì zhēngbīng gōngzuò.
english: The military conducts a recruitment drive every year.

sentence: 在医生看来，这个病例并非无望。
pinyin: Zài yīshēng kànlái, zhège bìnglì bìng fēi wúwàng.
english: In the doctor's view, this case is not without hope.

sentence: 这一事件引起了新闻界的广泛关注。
pinyin: Zhè yī shìjiàn yǐnqǐ le xīnwénjiè de guǎngfàn guānzhù.
english: This event attracted widespread attention from the media.

meaning: 1. to compete to be first; 2. to contest first place
sentence: 同学们争先回答老师的问题。
pinyin: Tóngxuémen zhēng xiān huídá lǎoshī de wèntí.
english: The students competed to be first to answer the teacher's question.

meaning: 1. to relax completely; 2. to empty one's mind; 3. (finance) to s
sentence: 他每天午休时都会放空一会儿。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān wǔxiū shí dōu huì fàngkōng yīhuìr.
english: He empties his mind for a while during his lunch break every day.

sentence: 邮件附上了相关文件请查收。
pinyin: Yóujiàn fùshàng le xiāngguān wénjiàn qǐng chāshōu.
english: The email has the relevant documents attached, please check.

meaning: 1. to consult; 2. to refer to; 3. to read (instructions)
sentence: 更多细节请参阅附录中的说明。
pinyin: Gèng duō xìjié qǐng cānyuè fùlù zhōng de shuōmíng.
english: For more details please refer to the instructions in the appendix.

sentence: 医生提醒患者定期检查性病。
pinyin: Yīshēng tíxǐng huànzhě dìngqī jiǎnchá xìngbìng.
english: The doctor reminded the patient to get regular checks for sexually transmitted diseases.

sentence: 这款产品有多种型式可选。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn yǒu duō zhǒng xíngshì kě xuǎn.
english: This product comes in multiple types to choose from.

sentence: 新员工本周都在受训，下周正式上岗。
pinyin: Xīn yuángōng běn zhōu dōu zài shòuxùn, xià zhōu zhèngshì shàng gǎng.
english: New employees are all receiving training this week and will officially start work next week.

meaning: 1. to put down in writing; 2. to take down notes; 3. transcript; 4. re
sentence: 警察对证人的陈述做了详细笔录。
pinyin: Jǐngchá duì zhèngrén de chénshù zuò le xiángxì bǐlù.
english: The police made a detailed transcript of the witness's statement.

sentence: 金融危机使很多企业倒闭。
pinyin: Jīnróng wēijī shǐ hěn duō qǐyè dǎobì.
english: The financial crisis caused many businesses to close down.

meaning: 1. to beat easily; 2. to gain an easy victory
sentence: 主队以三比零轻取对手。
pinyin: Zhǔduì yǐ sān bǐ líng qīngqǔ duìshǒu.
english: The home team easily beat their opponent three to zero.

sentence: 这首民歌被人们传唱了几百年。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu míngē bèi rénmen chuánchàng le jǐ bǎi nián.
english: This folk song has been passed down and sung for hundreds of years.

sentence: 公园的西端有一片树林。
pinyin: Gōngyuán de xīduān yǒu yī piàn shùlín.
english: There is a grove of trees at the western end of the park.

sentence: 邻里之间应该互相帮助。
pinyin: Línlǐ zhījiān yīnggāi hùxiāng bāngzhù.
english: Neighbors should help each other.

sentence: 定期检查有助于早期发现乳腺癌。
pinyin: Dìngqī jiǎnchá yǒu zhù yú zǎoqī fāxiàn rǔxiàn ái.
english: Regular check-ups help detect breast cancer early.

sentence: 川菜是中国著名的菜系之一。
pinyin: Chuāncài shì Zhōngguó zhùmíng de càixì zhī yī.
english: Sichuan cuisine is one of China's famous regional cuisines.

sentence: 感恩节那天他们烤了一只火鸡。
pinyin: Gǎn'ēnjié nà tiān tāmen kǎo le yī zhī huǒjī.
english: They roasted a turkey on Thanksgiving Day.

sentence: 她检查了邮件中的拼写错误。
pinyin: Tā jiǎnchá le yóujiàn zhōng de pīnxiě cuòwù.
english: She checked the spelling errors in the email.

sentence: 走廊里暗黑一片，他赶紧打开了手电筒。
pinyin: Zǒuláng lǐ àn hēi yī piàn, tā gǎnjǐn dǎkāi le shǒudiàntǒng.
english: The hallway was pitch dark, so he quickly switched on his flashlight.

meaning: to supervise the manufacture of; to supervise the shooting of films; e
sentence: 这部电影由著名导演监制，质量有保证。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yóu zhùmíng dǎoyǎn jiān zhì, zhìliàng yǒu bǎozhèng.
english: This film was executive produced by a renowned director, so the quality is guaranteed.

meaning: (idiom) so that's how it is; I see
sentence: 听了她的解释，我才明白，原来如此。
pinyin: Tīng le tā de jiěshì, wǒ cái míngbai, yuán lái rú cǐ.
english: After hearing her explanation, I finally understood — so that's how it is.

meaning: to return to one's original trade; to put (a business etc) under the a
sentence: 这类项目应归口到技术部门统一管理。
pinyin: Zhè lèi xiàngmù yīng guī kǒu dào jìshù bùmén tǒngyī guǎnlǐ.
english: This type of project should be put under the unified management of the technical department.

meaning: old-style money shop (a type of private bank that first appeared in th
sentence: 以前没有银行，大家都去钱庄存钱。
pinyin: Yǐqián méiyǒu yínháng, dàjiā dōu qù qián zhuāng cún qián.
english: Before banks existed, everyone used to deposit their money at old-style money shops.

meaning: older brother's wife; sister-in-law; elder sister (respectful appellat
sentence: 大嫂做的红烧肉味道特别好。
pinyin: Dà sǎo zuò de hóngshāo ròu wèidao tèbié hǎo.
english: My sister-in-law's braised pork is absolutely delicious.

sentence: 法院对该公司处以惩罚性赔偿金。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn duì gāi gōngsī chǔyǐ chéng fá xìng péichángjīn.
english: The court ordered the company to pay punitive damages.

meaning: two chambers (of legislative assembly), e.g. House of Representatives
sentence: 该法案需要经过两院投票才能通过。
pinyin: Gāi fǎ'àn xūyào jīngguò liǎng yuàn tóupiào cái néng tōngguò.
english: The bill needs to pass a vote in both chambers before it can become law.

sentence: 你可以选择任一颜色，都可以。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xuǎnzé rèn yī yánsè, dōu kěyǐ.
english: You can choose any color you like — either one is fine.

sentence: 对外贸易是推动该国经济发展的重要动力。
pinyin: Duì wài mào yì shì tuīdòng gāi guó jīngjì fāzhǎn de zhòngyào dònglì.
english: Foreign trade is a key driver of the country's economic development.

meaning: (of a term of office) to expire
sentence: 他的任期届满后就退休了。
pinyin: Tā de rènqī jiè mǎn hòu jiù tuìxiū le.
english: He retired after his term of office expired.

sentence: 老师让我们练习这个句型。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen liànxí zhège jù xíng.
english: The teacher had us practice this sentence pattern.

meaning: to supervise; to oversee (e.g. a construction project); (of a regulato
sentence: 这个工程有专人负责监理。
pinyin: Zhège gōngchéng yǒu zhuān rén fùzé jiān lǐ.
english: There's a dedicated person overseeing this construction project.

meaning: (serialized TV or Internet drama) show; series
sentence: 这部剧集一共有三十集。
pinyin: Zhè bù jù jí yīgòng yǒu sānshí jí.
english: This TV series has thirty episodes in total.

sentence: 他在研究自己家族的世系。
pinyin: Tā zài yánjiū zìjǐ jiāzú de shì xì.
english: He's researching his family's lineage.

sentence: 埃及是世界上最古老的古文明之一。
pinyin: Āijí shì shìjiè shang zuì gǔlǎo de gǔ wén míng zhī yī.
english: Egypt is one of the world's oldest ancient civilizations.

sentence: 这家公司很有前瞻性。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī hěn yǒu qián zhān xìng.
english: This company has a very forward-looking vision.

sentence: 医生建议他定期检查是否有肝炎。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì tā dìngqī jiǎnchá shìfǒu yǒu gān yán.
english: The doctor advised him to get regular checkups for hepatitis.

sentence: 这场比赛的赔率对主队非常有利。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng bǐsài de péi lǜ duì zhǔduì fēicháng yǒulì.
english: The betting odds for this match strongly favor the home team.

sentence: 他每天早上都会看报章。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang dōu huì kàn bào zhāng.
english: He reads the newspapers every morning.

sentence: 他把钱投入了一支私募基金。
pinyin: Tā bǎ qián tóurù le yī zhī sī mù jījīn.
english: He put his money into a private placement fund.

meaning: the surface of a wall (esp. an interior wall)
sentence: 他们把墙面刷成了浅蓝色。
pinyin: Tāmen bǎ qiáng miàn shuā chéng le qiǎn lán sè.
english: They painted the wall surface light blue.

sentence: 这个项目覆盖了整个县域。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù fùgài le zhěnggè xiàn yù.
english: This project covers the entire county area.

meaning: stock market index; share price index; abbr. for 股票指數|股票指数[gu3 piao4 z
sentence: 今天股指上涨了两个百分点。
pinyin: Jīntiān gǔ zhǐ shàngzhǎng le liǎng gè bǎifēndiǎn.
english: Today the stock market index rose by two percentage points.

meaning: underground palace (as part of imperial tomb)
sentence: 考古队发现了陵墓的地宫入口。
pinyin: Kǎogǔ duì fāxiàn le língmù de dì gōng rùkǒu.
english: The archaeology team discovered the entrance to the tomb's underground palace.

meaning: current politics; political situation of the time
sentence: 他喜欢看时政新闻节目。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān kàn shí zhèng xīnwén jiémù.
english: He likes watching current affairs news programs.

sentence: 这个岗位的工资下限是五千元。
pinyin: Zhège gǎngwèi de gōngzī xià xiàn shì wǔqiān yuán.
english: The lower bound of the salary for this position is five thousand yuan.
